pages.text: Portable vessels for storing Crystal Mana on the go. Three tiers exist:$(br2)$(l)Mana Storage$() — 256 CM$(br)$(l)Greater Mana Storage$() — 1024 CM, Cosmic rarity$(br)$(l)Ancient Mana Vessel$() — 4096 CM, Legend rarity

Hold the container in one hand, Magic Crystals in the other, then right-click to charge. Refined crystals inject 3 CM each.$(br2)A blue mana bar appears on your HUD while carrying a container. The durability bar on the item itself also shows current charge.$(br2)When deploying circles, stored mana is drawn before loose crystals in your inventory.
